title: Paxels-BTA
description: Bringing paxels to BTA with a standalone mod. Paxels are a pickaxe, axe and shovel all in one.
body: Adds paxels to BTA! Paxels are multitool tools that are made with a pick, shovel and axe of that material type. They have double the durability of their respective tool. This mod also comes with compatibility with the BTA Aether mod!
